topbar.page_title: Enter page number and press Enter
bookmark.need_pdf: Open a PDF first to add bookmarks
bookmark.save_failed: ⚠ Failed to save bookmark to server (saved locally)
shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
settings.title: Settings
settings.ui_language_desc: Change the app display language. The explanation language is controlled separately via the "Native language" setting.
settings.skip_translation_desc: If you can read the original text, skip the translation section and show only terminology and summary.
settings.native_language_desc: Select your native language to receive explanations in that language. If the paper is in the same language, the translation section is omitted.
settings.ask_feature_desc: Set up a cloud LLM API key to ask questions based on the full text of the paper. Translation and explanation work without any setup.
settings.base_url_hint: e.g. http://localhost:1234 (API key can be left empty)
settings.api_key_help_title: How to get an API key
settings.help_gemini_step: Click "Create API key" → Copy and paste into the field above → Save
settings.help_gemini_note: The free tier is more than enough.
settings.help_openai_step: Click "Create new secret key" → Copy and paste into the field above → Save
settings.help_anthropic_step: Click "Create Key" → Copy and paste into the field above → Save
settings.help_custom_desc: Connect to any server that provides an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint, such as LM Studio, Ollama (OpenAI-compatible mode), vLLM, or LocalAI.
settings.help_custom_url: Enter the server address in the Base URL field (e.g. http://localhost:1234)
settings.help_custom_key: Leave the API key empty if not required
settings.help_custom_model: Select a model from the server's list, or enter a custom name
settings.key_privacy: Your key is stored only on this Mac and is used solely for communication with the selected provider's API.
settings.models_hint: Enter an API key to fetch available models
list.title: Papers Read
list.search_placeholder: Filter by title or PDF name
list.empty: No memos yet. Open a PDF and start writing.
list.confirm_delete:
Delete "{title}"?
Memo, bookmarks, and conversation history will also be removed.
list.pdf_not_cached: This PDF is not cached (open it once via "Open PDF" to restore it next time)
memo.title_placeholder: Paper title (shown as heading in the list)
memo.body_placeholder:
Summarize in your own words (Markdown supported).
e.g. What problem / How solved / What's new / Relevance to my research …
pdf.drop_hint: Drag & drop a PDF here, or click "Open PDF"
pdf.drop_hint_shortcuts: ⌘D Add bookmark　←/→ Navigate pages　? Shortcut list
explain.empty_hint: Select text and press ⌘E for translation + explanation
explain.empty_hint_ask: You can also ask questions about the full paper below.
ask.input_placeholder: Ask about this paper (⌘+Enter to send)
welcome.title: Welcome to Naruhodo
welcome.subtitle: AI-powered next-generation paper reader
welcome.step1_desc: Drag & drop, or click "Open PDF". Supports papers in any language
welcome.step2_desc: Drag over any passage. You'll get a translation, term definitions, and a plain-language summary
welcome.step3_desc: ⌘D Add bookmark, ⌘B Toggle memo, ⌘J Focus memo, ⌘M Paper list, ⊞ button for standard/3-column layout. ←/→ to navigate pages
welcome.step4_desc: Register an API key (Gemini/OpenAI/Claude/local AI) in Settings to ask questions based on the full paper text
welcome.tip: Hover over the ? in the top-right corner to see all keyboard shortcuts
export.title: PDF Export Preview
export.hint: Select "Save as PDF" in the print dialog
setup.title: ### Initial Setup
setup.body:
Explanations use a local LLM (Ollama). No cloud transmission — no API key required.

1. [Install Ollama](https://ollama.com/download)
2. Launch the Ollama app
3. Reload this page

The app will download the model automatically.
setup.model_needed_body: Press the button below to start the download (first time only, ~3 GB).
server.ask_not_configured: > ⚠ Question feature is not configured. Register an API key in Settings.
server.pip_openai: > ⚠ The openai package is not installed. Please run `pip install openai`.
server.pip_anthropic: > ⚠ The anthropic package is not installed. Please run `pip install anthropic`.
server.base_url_missing: > ⚠ Base URL is not set. Enter the endpoint URL in Settings.
server.model_not_found:
> ⚠ Model **{model}** is not available.
>
> Run `ollama pull {model}` in your terminal, then try again.
server.ollama_error: > ⚠ Ollama error (HTTP {status}). Check the model name or run `ollama serve`.
server.setup_guide:
> ⚠ **Ollama not found**
>
> The explanation feature requires Ollama (local LLM).
>
> 1. [Install Ollama](https://ollama.com/download)
> 2. Launch the Ollama app
> 3. `ollama pull {model}`
>
> Once ready, select text again.
server.pull_done: ✓ Download complete! Please reload the page.
